tokens.text: dries out when not in water

fields.title: Dried Out Event
fields.description: Event to fire when the drying out time runs out. Can be an object with event and target properties, or a simple event string.

fields.title: Recover After Dried Out Event
fields.description: Event to fire when entity was already dried out but received increase in water supply. Can be an object with event and target properties, or a simple event string.

fields.title: Stopped Drying Out Event
fields.description: Event to fire when entity stopped drying out. Can be an object with event and target properties, or a simple event string.

generated_doNotEdit.title: Drying Out Timer
generated_doNotEdit.description: Adds a timer for drying out that will count down and fire 'dried_out_event' or will stop as soon as the entity will get under rain or water and fire 'stopped_drying_out_event'

fields.title: Dried Out Event
fields.description: Event to fire when the drying out time runs out.

fields.title: Recover After Dried Out Event
fields.description: Event to fire when entity was already dried out but received increase in water supply.

fields.title: Stopped Drying Out Event
fields.description: Event to fire when entity stopped drying out, for example got into water or under rain.

fields.title: Total Time
fields.description: Amount of time in seconds to dry out fully.

fields.title: Water Bottle Refill Time
fields.description: Optional amount of additional time in seconds given by using splash water bottle on entity.
